posters.title: Fintech Mobile Checkout Flow
posters.author: Advanced
posters.des: Design a seamless mobile multi-step checkout flow for international bank transfers. Ensure clear currency exchange conversions and payment status feedback.
step_by_step: Map out user journey from product to payment success
Design low-fidelity wireframes for each step
Test flow with sample users to identify friction
Refine layout and finalize UI handoff

posters.title: Healthcare Appointment Booking
posters.author: Intermediate
posters.des: Create a user-friendly flow for elderly patients to book appointments with their doctors online.
step_by_step: Analyze the pain points of current medical booking systems
Sketch out a simplified 3-step booking process
Design large touch targets and high-contrast typography
Develop a confirmation screen with clear instructions

posters.title: Onboarding for Fitness App
posters.author: Easy
posters.des: Design an onboarding sequence that personalizes the workout experience without overwhelming the user.
step_by_step: Determine the absolute minimum data needed from the user
Design engaging illustrations for each onboarding step
Provide a 'Skip' option for power users
